oretory.configuration.title: Oretory Config
oretory.ponder.miner_basic.text_1: The Miner can be placed directly on top of any Ore block
oretory.ponder.miner_basic.text_2: Place any Fuel source into the Miner's input slot to power it
oretory.ponder.miner_basic.text_3: Once fuelled, the Miner continuously produces Raw Ore without ever breaking the block
oretory.ponder.miner_basic.text_4: Next: Mining from two Ore blocks at once, and Redstone control
oretory.ponder.miner_redstone.text_1: Place an Ore block above the Miner to extract from both sides simultaneously
oretory.ponder.miner_redstone.text_2: Dual extraction uses 2x Fuel per cycle, but produces 2x Raw Ore in return
oretory.ponder.miner_redstone.text_3: A Redstone signal will instantly pause the Miner
oretory.ponder.miner_redstone.text_4: Next: Fully automated Fuel input and Ore output
oretory.ponder.miner_automation.text_1: A Chest stocked with Fuel feeds the Miner automatically via a Funnel and Mechanical Belt
oretory.ponder.miner_automation.text_2: The Miner runs continuously as long as it is supplied with Fuel
oretory.ponder.miner_automation.text_3: A Funnel on the output side pulls Raw Ore out and delivers it to a storage Chest via Belt
oretory.ponder.miner_automation.text_4: With this setup the Miner runs indefinitely, completely hands-free
